channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal Council Challenges Advocate Mkhwebane's Fitness to Practice
item.description: The Legal Practice Council (LPC) has initiated legal proceedings to bar Advocate Busisiwe Mkhwebane from practicing law, citing her past incompetence as a public protector and allegations of misconduc...

item.title: ABS-CBN and GMA Launch New Mystery-Romance Series 'The Secrets of Hotel 88'
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios has announced that iWant will provide viewers with exclusive early access to the upcoming mystery-romance series 'The Secrets of Hotel 88', a collaborative project between ABS-CBN and ...

item.title: Gas Prices and Pepsico Shares Reflect Consumer Concerns
item.description: The article discusses the impact of rising gas prices on consumer behavior and the recent decline in Pepsico shares. As gas prices continue to climb, households are facing increased expenses, leading ...

item.title: New Footage Casts Doubt on ICE's Account of Houston Incident
item.description: A new video has emerged that challenges the official account of an incident involving ICE agents in Houston, Texas, where a 52-year-old Mexican national, Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, was killed. The footag...

item.title: Tanzanian Official Proposes Tech Solutions for Serengeti Conservation
item.description: A Tanzanian official has proposed integrating advanced technology into the management of Serengeti National Park to enhance conservation efforts and address challenges like anti-poaching, climate chan...

item.title: Neil the seal: A wild encounter with cultural significance
item.description: Neil the seal, a five-year-old southern elephant seal, has captured global attention for his wild personality and humorous antics. His recent appearance in Tasmania sparked a frenzy, with local author...

item.title: ADC Criticizes APC for Ignoring Poverty and Focusing on 2027 Election
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has strongly criticized the ruling All Progressives Congress (APC) for prioritizing the 2027 election over pressing issues like poverty and hunger. ADC National P...

item.title: Chancellor House Reopened as Historical Museum Honoring Mandela and Tambo's Legacy
item.description: Chancellor House, once Nelson Mandela and Oliver Tambo's law office, has been transformed into a museum and library in Johannesburg. The R7-million restoration project preserved the building's histori...

item.title: WestJet Flight Attendants Begin Strike Vote Over Unpaid Work Hours and Compensation Disputes
item.description: WestJet flight attendants have initiated a strike vote, which will run until July 15, 2026. The Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) 8125 is seeking member support for a potential strike, citing ...

item.title: Cristina Sanz, Reality TV Star, Dies at 36 After Cardiac Arrest
item.description: Cristina Sanz, a beloved reality TV star known for her role in the Emmy-winning series 'Born This Way,' has passed away at 36 after suffering a sudden cardiac arrest. Her family confirmed her death in...

item.title: Tyler Robinson faces murder trial over Charlie Kirk's killing in Utah
item.description: Tyler Robinson, 23, is facing a murder trial in Utah after being accused of fatally shooting Charlie Kirk, founder of Turning Point USA, on September 10, 2025. During the pretrial hearing, prosecutors...

item.title: Wellness Influencers Promote $50 Straws Claiming Protection Against Electromagnetic Radiation Without Scientific Evidence
item.description: The article discusses how wellness influencers are marketing $50 straws as protective against electromagnetic radiation (EMR) from electronic devices, despite a lack of scientific evidence supporting ...

item.title: Yanga Footballers Donate Desks and Supplies to Improve School Infrastructure
item.description: Three prominent Yanga Sports Club players, Dickson Job, Kibwana Shomary, and Abuutwalib Mshery, recently visited Kilonga Primary School to donate essential educational supplies. The initiative include...

item.title: Andy Burnham poised to become UK Prime Minister after securing Labour leadership nomination
item.description: Andy Burnham has secured the majority of Labour MPs' support, with 322 nominations, making him the sole candidate for Labour leadership. This positions him to become the next UK Prime Minister, follow...

item.title: Baguio Courts Urge Face Masks to Curb COVID-19 Spread
item.description: The Baguio Regional Trial Court (RTC) and Municipal Trial Court in Cities (MTCC) have issued a face mask advisory for all individuals entering the Hall of Justice after a court employee tested positiv...

item.title: Fremantle Dockers Deliver Stunning Comeback Against Sydney Swans in AFL Clash
item.description: In a thrilling AFL match, the Fremantle Dockers staged a remarkable second-half comeback to defeat the Sydney Swans 15.21 (111) to 10.13 (73). Trailing by 25 points at the end of the second quarter, t...

item.title: Live-Action 'Moana' Remake Faces Criticism for Lack of Innovation
item.description: The live-action adaptation of Disney's *Moana* has sparked debate over its necessity, with critics arguing it lacks originality despite its high budget and A-list cast. The film follows the Polynesian...

item.title: Tragic deaths of a man and his four-year-old nephew linked to contaminated biscuits from a tuckshop
item.description: Police in Witbank are investigating the deaths of a 43-year-old man and his four-year-old nephew, who allegedly died after consuming biscuits from a looted tuckshop. The incident occurred on 8 July 20...

item.title: Prime Minister Carney Reacts to Diplomatic Gift from Turkish President Erdogan
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney expressed surprise upon receiving an engraved revolver as a gift from Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan during the NATO Summit in Ankara. The weapon, individually inscr...

item.title: Brianna LaPaglia's sisters: Family dynamics and the influencer's journey
item.description: The article explores the life of Brianna LaPaglia, a social media influencer known for her viral TikTok content and podcasting career. It highlights her three half-sisters from her father's first marr...
